confirm_clear_logs: Do you really want to delete the entire server log?
error_script_exists: A script with this name already exists.
warn_device_class_icon: Warning: Entity '{{entityId}}' uses device_class '{{deviceClass}}'. Home Assistant often ignores custom icons for these classes in favor of class-specific defaults.
library_mode_banner: LIBRARY MODE — This script is passive. Use @include {{filename}} in automations.
warn_library_in_use:
Warning: Library '{{filename}}' is used by {{count}} script(s): {{scripts}}.
Do you really want to delete it?
wizard_type_tooltip:
Determines how the script is exposed to Home Assistant. This controls the @expose header inside the script's code.

- 'Switch': Creates an entity with on/off state (@expose: switch).
- 'Button': Creates a button to execute the script (@expose: button).
- 'Background': No visible entity in HA (no @expose).
- 'Library': Reusable code that can be imported by other scripts (no @expose).
wizard_dropzone_text: Drop file here or click to select
wizard_url_hint: The URL must point directly to the raw (.js) content.
wizard_import_warning: Warning: Only import code from trusted sources.
safe_mode_msg: Bootloop detected. All scripts have been stopped to protect the system.
safe_mode_deactivated: Safe Mode deactivated. You can now start scripts manually.

general.expert_mode_desc: Shows advanced options and technical details (e.g., file paths, raw views).
general.confirm_delete_desc: Shows a confirmation dialog before deleting scripts.

editor.word_wrap_desc: Word wrap can also be controlled via the button in the toolbar.

statusbar.show_statusbar_desc: Displays the status bar at the bottom of the application.
statusbar.show_sparkline_desc: Displays a small historical graph for this value.
statusbar.hide_sparkline_on_dense_desc: Automatically hides mini charts when all 3 slots are active. This prevents the status bar from looking cluttered or text being truncated.
statusbar.header_action_desc: HA entity to show as a quick-action button in the sidebar header (switch or button).

mqtt.mqtt_autodetect_success: MQTT settings successfully imported from Home Assistant.
mqtt.mqtt_autodetect_not_found: No MQTT configuration found in Home Assistant.

system.title: System Settings
system.default_throttle_desc: Delay between individual entities in ha.select() calls.
system.restart_required_hint: Please restart Home Assistant (YAML quick reload is not sufficient).
system.mqtt_autodetect_success: MQTT settings successfully imported from Home Assistant.
system.mqtt_autodetect_not_found: No MQTT configuration found in Home Assistant.
system.mqtt_warning_expose: Script uses @expose, but MQTT is not active.
system.mqtt_banner_disabled_desc: Enable MQTT in settings to expose your scripts to Home Assistant.
system.mqtt_banner_disconnected_desc: Connection to broker lost. Scripts might not be controllable in HA.

danger.node_memory_desc: Maximum RAM per script. Prevents a single script from crashing the system.
danger.restart_count_desc: Number of crashes within the time window before Safe Mode is activated.
danger.restart_time_desc: Period in seconds during which crashes are counted for bootloop detection.
danger.filesystem_enabled_desc: Grants scripts access to ha.fs for reading and writing files within sandboxed directories (/config/js_automations/data/, /share/, /media/). Use with caution.
danger.quota_desc: Maximum total size for this virtual root. 0 = unlimited.
danger.capability_enforcement_desc: When enabled, scripts that use network (http/https/fetch) or shell execution (child_process) without declaring @permission in their header will throw a PermissionDeniedError at runtime.

messages.error_duplicate_key: A variable with this key already exists.
messages.error_invalid_key: Invalid Key: Only alphanumeric characters and underscores are allowed.
messages.invalid_json:
Invalid JSON format: {{error}}

The value will be saved as a string.
messages.confirm_delete: Do you really want to delete the key '{{key}}' from the store?
messages.confirm_clear: WARNING: Do you really want to clear the ENTIRE store? All saved variables from all scripts will be lost!
messages.error_invalid_number: Value is not a valid number
messages.error_invalid_json_start: Value does not look like JSON (must start with { or [)

cap_preview_undeclared_warning: This script uses capabilities not declared in its @permission header.
cap_tip_network_warn: Network access detected — add @permission network to your header
cap_tip_fs_read_warn: File read access detected — add @permission fs:read to your header
cap_tip_fs_write_warn: File write access detected — add @permission fs:write to your header
cap_tip_exec_warn: Shell execution detected — add @permission exec to your header
cap_tip_unused: Declared in @permission but not detected in source
